front.title: SCHC Payload Compression for Structured Formats

abstract.t: This document describes techniques to adapt the SCHC framework (RFC8724), used for header compression, to also compress and decompress payload of specific protocols. To this end, this document defines a new matching operator, equal-template, to check equality of field values with respect to a user-defined template, and a payload keyword to be used as Field IDentifier (FID) to signal the presence of payload to be compressed or decompressed. Additionally, this document defines a set of template functions and variables to optimize user-defined templates, which can be extended through the IANA registry defined herein.
